name: su.hpt/hptsu-mcp
description: Search hpt.su — Russian/EAEU vehicle compliance documents: type approvals, certificates, VIN lookup.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: API key issued at https://hpt.su/user/mcp/ (free tier available).

environmentVariables.name: HPTSU_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: X-API-Key issued in the hpt.su cabinet (requires MCP_FREE or MCP_PAID scope).

environmentVariables.name: HPTSU_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override of the API base URL.
